context.projectOverview: Fleet Orchestrator Sprint 2: ChildScaffolder.scaffold() (mkdir + write Zod-valid config via Sprint 1's buildChildConfig + git init, failures captured as data, non-empty folders skipped untouched) and ChildRunner.run() (spawn one `agent-bober run` child via execa reject:false with default timeout and dist/cli/index.js entry resolution via import.meta.url).

completedSprints.title: Fleet manifest schema, loader, and child config builder
completedSprints.summary: Created src/fleet/manifest.ts (FleetManifestSchema, FleetChild/FleetManifest types, async load()) and src/fleet/child-config.ts (buildChildConfig(child) -> BoberConfigSchema-valid DeepSeek config via createDefaultConfig + shallow merge). DeepSeek provider string is 'openai-compat', endpoint 'https://api.deepseek.com'.
